Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Mick Garris returns with more action-packed trailers and influential classics.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Mick Garris Volume 2

Video.summary: Masterful movie maker Mick Garris joins Trailers from Hell to talk about his favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Mick Garris Volume 1

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: Director John Landis joins Trailers from Hell to talk 'Battle for the Planet of the Apes' and more.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy
The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Video.summary: High school misfits, teenage rebels, and coming-of-age chaos straight out of Hollywood.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Filmmaker Ernest Dickerson talks his favorite Westerns and more.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Ernest Dickerson

Video.summary: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: SAW director Darren Lynn Bousman talks about his favorite psychological thrillers, dark dramas, and cult musicals.
Video.grandparentTitle: Guru Showcase: Darren Lynn Bousman Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: What do you get when you cross “The Pink Panther,” with “Marx Brothers at the Circus?” A great time!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

Image.alt: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

Video.summary: Did you hear the one where the “Bad News Bears” got kicked out of the “Animal House?”
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 2

Image.alt: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 2
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 2
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 2

Video.summary: From slapstick classics to timeless musical comedies, celebrate Hollywood's golden age of laughter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Irreverent, iconic, and effortlessly cool, this is 1960s comedy at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From campy capers to daring satire, let's celebrate the offbeat style of 1960s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Outrageous, rebellious, and unforgettable, 1970s comedy went full throttle.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold, bizarre, and brilliantly original, these 80s films defined a generation of laughs.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Quirky, irreverent, and instantly iconic, you favorite filmmakers celebrate the best of ’90s comedy.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Larry Cohen shares his love for classic mysteries, thrilling B-movie gems, and his own cult hits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Prolific filmmaker Larry Cohen reveals the films that inspired his iconic, boundary-pushing style.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Legendary Hollywood hitmaker John Badham (Saturday Night Fever, Blue Thunder) talks about his favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ti West pays tribute to quirky comedies and compelling dramas that thrilled audiences with their distinctive flair.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: SAW director Darren Lynn Bousman introduces a gripping blend of psychological horror, supernatural chills, and classic creature features.
Video.grandparentTitle: Guru Showcase: Darren Lynn Bousman Vol. 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From spaced-out comedies to groundbreaking science fiction, writer and director Max Landis talks about his favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alien conquerors plot to destroy humanity using mind control and the monster Viras. Can Gamera stop this madness??
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: “Smokey and the Bandit” was dining with a “Fish Called Wanda” then the “Ghostbusters” showed up!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3

Image.alt: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 3

Video.summary: A “Serial Mom” went to a “Matinee” on “Groundhog Day,” it did not end well!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 4

Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 4

Video.summary: Screenwriter Larry Karaszewski talks about the classic films that have influenced his career.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Karaszewski Klassics

Video.summary: 'A History of Violence' screenwriter Josh Olson talks about his favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Josh Olson Volume 1

Video.summary: 'Girlfight' director Karyn Kusama joins Trailers from Hell to talk about her favorite films.
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Karyn Kusama

Video.summary: In Vol. 2, screenwriter Josh Olson talks Brian De Palma, Michael Mann, and more!
Video.title: Guru Showcase: Josh Olson Volume 2

Video.summary: A bumbling photographer mistaken for a private detective becomes embroiled in a web of intrigue and danger as he tries to solve a murder case.
Video.title: My Favorite Brunette

Video.summary: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying.
Video.title: His Girl Friday
